title: Re-Classic
body:
## **This modpack aims to reintroduce classic Minecraft with its unique features.** 

Re-Classic has its own philosophy, it exists not because some old players are blinded by nostalgia, but because old Minecraft was actually simpler, it made more sense. Modern Minecraft has a variety of cool features too, however now, it feels kind of hollow, which is why this modpack exists. It's all about chilling in your simple escape.

Re-Classic is my own perfect version of Minecraft.

# **_[Discord](https://discord.gg/DXNNyV7Z3w)_**

> Have fun :) *We are released!*
